## LibraryRuntime.IRuntimeIngredient.isChocolate() method

Returns true if this is a chocolate ingredient. When true, chocolate-specific properties are available.

**Signature:**

```typescript
isChocolate(): this is IRuntimeChocolateIngredient;
```
**Returns:**

this is [IRuntimeChocolateIngredient](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.iruntimechocolateingredient.md)
